prompt: draw me a map for a space colony map of Mars settlements, showing terraformed areas, mining operations, transportation tubes, atmospheric processors, and Earth communication stations
prompt_refined: A detailed, futuristic map of Mars settlements. Ensure the map is well-labeled and designed in an informative infographic style.
